sections.description: Internal Kingdom tool for managing Sermons, Events, and Calendar views (with recurrence).
sections.changelog:
• Improved event time handling to prevent fatal errors when times are missing.
  • All-day events no longer require start and end times.
  • Non-all-day events with missing times now safely hide time instead of crashing.
  • Updated event lists and calendar event list to hide time for all-day events and events without a specified time.
  • Improved event admin form behavior so date fields update instantly when All-day is toggled.
  • Improved ICS event download handling for events with missing time values.
